files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for October Guide Lessons. Lesson II appears to be just a header with no content. The lessons cover Theology/Marriage, Work/Business, Literature/Hymnology, and Social Service/Education. The content flows continuously but has clear subject matter divisions that match different lesson topics.
